item.title: JDM Land Cruiser Shops Refused to Fix

item.title: CR-V Repair Nearly Cost $2K
item.description: A Honda CR-V inspection revealed no issues, saving nearly $2,000 in unnecessary repairs and highlighting the importance of proper diagnostics.
